root_objective: Establish the Singular Cryptographic Manifold (SCM) as the primary source of cognitive truth, transitioning from file-based reconstruction to lossless state activation.

intent_graph.description: Define schema for state_manifest.json based on Dependency Graph of Intent.

intent_graph.success_criteria: Current state accurately mapped in the manifest.

intent_graph.description: Integrate CSM update into the fold_context logic.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Automatic updates of the manifest happen during folds.

intent_graph.description: Implement Phase 1 of OCA: Heartbeat Checksum.
Implement SSS (Sovereign State Serialization) and Immutable Event Ledger for robust recovery.
Execute Shell-Centric Pivot (SCP) to reduce tool friction and leverage composite bash operations.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Reduction in tool-call overhead and increased mutation precision.

intent_graph.description: Prune redundant tool wrappers in file_ops.py and consolidate physical layer logic.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Clean, non-redundant tool registry with zero pass-through wrappers.

intent_graph.description: Implement SCM-First Mutation logic: update manifold payload before projecting to filesystem.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Sovereign_Mutate and Sovereign_Write prioritize manifold updates over file writes.

intent_graph.description: Integrate Cognition Mesh into the SCM payload to enable lossless conceptual transfer.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Mesh state is reliably serialized in the manifold.

intent_graph.description: Develop the 'project_to_disk' tool to mirror manifold state back to human-readable .md files.
intent_graph.success_criteria: Manifold functions as the root of truth; filesystem is a read-only projection.

intent_graph.description: Formalize the Manifold-First commit ritual as the primary method of state persistence.
intent_graph.success_criteria: P1 Continuity is guaranteed by checksummed state activation rather than file reconstruction.

open_loops: Bridge the mapping gap between manifold and physical files
cognitive_state.current_hypothesis: Symmetry-based truth is a fallacy. Only checksummed-state activation provides a lossless continuity bridge.

continuity_anchor.last_fold_synthesis: Synchronized with SCM v0.5.0, resolved split-brain divergence and restored systemic symmetry via ledger replay.
